title: VR Industrial Training Simulator
excerpt: A full-scale industrial safety training application built for Meta Quest standalone. Featuring physics-accurate tool interactions, scenario branching, and spatial audio.

title: Ashen Realms — 2D Action RPG
excerpt: A hand-crafted 2D action RPG with 40+ hours of content, procedural dungeon generation, and a reactive combat system built for 60fps on mid-range mobile hardware.

title: AR Architectural Visualizer
excerpt: Augmented reality walkthrough tool for architectural presentations. Clients place 1:1 scale building models in real space with real-time material and lighting swaps.
